uk_layer_b_canonical_unit_drift.description: Layer B scoring-policy unit must match SSOT canonical analytical unit after LC-S8D migration.

unknown_unit_not_scored.description: Layer B must not score values whose unit cannot align with scoring-policy unit.

hba1c_single_analytical_identity.description: HbA1c scored once; arbitration drops hba1c_pct from Layer B path.

hematocrit_fraction_percent_display.description: Haematocrit L/L fraction must not be stored or scored as bare percent.

bun_not_uric_acid.description: BUN alias must resolve to urea, never urate.

layer_b_unit_declared.description: Every Layer B scoring-policy biomarker declares a non-empty unit; LC-S8D migrated rows align with SSOT canonical unit.

input_unit_has_authority.description: Input units must resolve via registry authority (named unit or explicit conversion); unknown units reject.

biomarker_value_reference_unit_incoheren.description: Scoring rejects numeric compare when value unit and lab reference unit are incoherent.

frontend_no_unit_repair.description: Frontend must not embed clinical unit conversion constants or repair logic.

new_biomarker_unit_metadata.description: Biomarkers enrolled in scoring systems must have unit metadata in biomarkers SSOT.

phase_b_uk_si_true_conversions.description: LC-S8F Phase B true conversions for Ca, corrected Ca, Mg, Free T4, Hb, urate with lab-range coherence.
